pending.description: Grant applications still require manual form submission on most platforms
Social posts go out at fixed cron times, not optimized timing
Ko-fi page content does not update automatically with new art or stats
When engines fail, the error is logged but nothing is done about it
System posts content but never learns what resonates
Donors get one thank-you email and then silence
Press outreach emails go out but are never followed up if no reply
Gaza Rose art listings on Gumroad are not updated automatically
System health is only visible by reading GitHub Actions logs
System consumes Wikipedia data but never contributes back
